post.description: Create invoice - Requires invoices.create permission

get.description: Get invoice by number - Requires invoices.view permission

Get all sales data from invoices and inventory.
Returns details including: Invoice By, Supplier Code, Invoice Date & Time, 
Customer Name, Customer Number, Item Sold, Stock #, Container No, 
Sale Description, Invoice Number, Qty, Unit Price, Paid Amount, 
Balance Amount, Load Status, Load Date and Time
Requires invoices.view permission

schema.title: Response Get Sales Data Api Invoices Sales Data Get

get.description:
Get invoice number suggestion based on total invoice count.
Format: INV-YYYY-NNNN (e.g., INV-2024-0001, INV-2024-0002)
Returns suggested invoice number, total invoices count, next sequence number, and year.
Requires invoices.view permission

schema.title: Response Get Invoice Number Suggestion Api Invoices Suggest Invoice Number Get

get.description: Get invoice by ID - Requires invoices.view permission
Get invoice items - Requires invoices.view permission
Get invoice payments - Requires invoices.view permission

schema.title: Response Get Invoice Payments Api Invoices Invoice Id Payments Get

post.description: Add payment to invoice - Requires invoices.update permission

Save invoice - creates new or updates existing with full sync
If id is provided in request, updates existing invoice
If id is None, creates new invoice
Syncs all items and payments
Requires invoices.create or invoices.update permission

Granular save operation for complex invoice operations
Supports:
- create_invoice OR update_invoice (mutually exclusive)
- create_items: array of items to be created
- update_items: array of item ids and attributes to be updated
- delete_item_ids: array of item ids to be deleted
- create_payments: array of payments to be created
- update_payments: array of payment ids and attributes to be updated
- delete_payment_ids: array of payment ids to be deleted
Requires invoices.create or invoices.update permission

get.description: Get all invoice payments with relationships - Requires invoices.view permission

post.description:
Create a refund item from an invoice item.
This will:
1. Copy the invoice_item data to refund_items table
2. Add refund-specific information
3. Delete the invoice_item
4. Update po_item status back to 'in_stock'
5. Update invoice totals

get.description:
Get root level folders (Containers, Purchase Orders, Assets, Employees)
Only shows folders the user has access to based on their role and permissions

schema.title: Response Get Root Folders Api File Manager Get

get.description:
Get contents of a folder based on entity type with pagination and search

**Workflow:**
1. Browse folders: Call without entity_id to get paginated list of folders
2. View documents: Call with entity_id to get documents inside a specific folder
3. Employee special case: Call with entity_id first (shows document type folders), then with entity_id + document_type (shows documents)

**Examples - Browse Folders:**
- GET /file-manager/containers?page=1&page_size=50 - Get container folders (paginated)
- GET /file-manager/containers?search=SUP001 - Search containers by code
- GET /file-manager/containers?search=Dubai - Search containers by branch name
- GET /file-manager/purchase_orders?search=PO-2024 - Search purchase orders
- GET /file-manager/assets?search=Toyota - Search assets by supplier
- GET /file-manager/employees?search=John - Search employees by name

**Examples - View Documents:**
- GET /file-manager/containers?entity_id=1 - Get documents inside container ID 1
- GET /file-manager/purchase_orders?entity_id=5 - Get documents inside purchase order ID 5
- GET /file-manager/assets?entity_id=10 - Get documents inside asset ID 10
- GET /file-manager/employees?entity_id=3 - Get document type folders for employee ID 3
- GET /file-manager/employees?entity_id=3&document_type=passport - Get passport documents for employee ID 3

**Search Capabilities:**
- Containers: Search by container_code, supplier_name, branch_name
- Purchase Orders: Search by po_number, supplier_name, branch_name
- Assets: Search by asset_id, asset_name, branch_name, supplier_name
- Employees: Search by employee_code, full_name

**Access Control:**
- Containers: Administrator or users with access to the container's destination branch
- Purchase Orders: Administrator or users with access to the PO's container's destination branch
- Assets: Administrator or users with access to the asset's purchase_branch or current_operating_branch
- Employees: Administrator or the employee themselves

**Response:**
- folders: List of folders (when browsing or viewing employee document types)
- documents: List of documents (when viewing documents inside a specific folder)
- total_folders: Total count of folders (for pagination)
- total_documents: Total count of documents
- page: Current page number
- page_size: Items per page
